results.title: Operations Pulse is now collapsible
results.evidence: data-testid='operations-pulse-toggle' found. Button with aria-expanded toggles between false/true. Collapsed: KPIs show inline in compact bar (14x14 icons in h-5 w-5 containers). Expanded: detailed KPI cards with 14x14 icons in h-8 w-8 containers. ChevronDown SVG present. Fleet inventory visually dominates below.

results.title: Cluster cards have hover states
results.evidence: Cluster cards only have 'transition-colors' and 'hover:border-[var(--color-border-hover)]'. Missing: hover:-translate-y-[2px] or hover:-translate-y-[3px] lift effect. Missing: hover:shadow-lg or enhanced shadow. No framer-motion whileHover configured. Cards have cursor-pointer and border color change but do NOT lift or gain enhanced shadow on hover. Verified in both dark and light mode.
results.expected: Cards should lift slightly (y:-2 or y:-3) with enhanced shadow on hover
results.actual: Cards only change border color on hover. No translateY, no shadow enhancement.

results.title: Tag chips are non-interactive
results.evidence: Provider/version tag chips (aws, K8s v1.32.0, minikube, K8s v1.35) have CSS class 'pointer-events-none' and 'select-none'. Computed pointerEvents='none'. They render as display-only labels. Environment badges (PRODUCTION, DEV/MINIKUBE) and status badges remain interactive - these are intentionally so (different component type).

results.title: Check now button visible
results.evidence: Health check buttons found on both cluster cards. Visible by default (display:flex, visibility:visible, opacity:0.5). Show 'Check' label text. Have proper aria-label: 'Run health check for cluster {id}'. Size 53x19px. Opacity increases on hover with border accent effect. Not hidden until hover - visible at all times with subtle dimming.

results.title: No ALLCAPS subtitles
results.evidence: All dashboard subtitles use sentence case: 'Operations overview', 'Production environment', 'Dev / Minikube environment', 'KPI-first snapshot of cluster health...'. textTransform='none' on all subtitle elements. Only environment badges (PRODUCTION, DEV / MINIKUBE) use uppercase class - this is the expected/allowed behavior per spec. Verified in both dark and light mode.

results.title: KPI icons normalized
results.evidence: All KPI icons are exactly 14x14px SVGs. Compact bar: 4 icons in h-5 w-5 (20x20) containers. Expanded cards: 4 icons in h-8 w-8 (32x32) rounded-xl containers. All use viewBox='0 0 24 24'. No icon is noticeably larger/heavier. Consistent visual weight across all KPI stats.
